channel.title: Realtime on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Realtime on Arrans github.io

item.title: n0-computer/iroh
item.description: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.

item.title: blakeblackshear/frigate
item.description: NVR with realtime local object detection for IP cameras

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: teableio/teable
item.description: ✨ The Next Gen Airtable Alternative: No-Code Postgres

item.title: Sharkord/sharkord
item.description: Lightweight, self-hosted, open-source chat server with voice, video, text, and screen sharing. Built for small groups who want privacy, simplicity, and full control over their data.

item.title: anycable/anycable
item.description: Realtime server for reliable two-way communication to power-up any backend
